headline: Best Buy Introduces Reward Points for My Best Buy Plus and Total Members
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, May 04, 2026--Starting June 4, Best Buy is introducing reward points for its My Best Buy Plus and My Best Buy Total memberships. Plus and Total members will earn 1% back in rewards on every eligible purchase, and 6% back1 in rewards when they use their My Best Buy® Credit Card. Points are in addition to the many benefits members enjoy today, like exclusive pricing and deals, 24/7 tech support, product protection2, free two-day shipping3 and more.
